<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# scripts/agent_supervisor.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:00:25Z

## Purpose
Supervise INSUR agent queues, schedules, heartbeats, and task results.

This script is the local operational control plane for the Redis-backed agent
fleet. It does not execute tasks itself; it observes worker liveness, queue
backlog, recurring schedules, recent completions, and process-test coverage so
operators can see whether agents are taking work and finishing it.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import argparse
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import os
- from `_` import sys
- from `_` import time
- from `collections` import Counter
- from `datetime` import datetime, timezone
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `typing` import Any

## Inputs
- CLI args: --redis-url, --sample, --interval, --task-id, --limit, --max-backlog, --max-recent-failures, --output
- Env vars: BEV_REDIS_URL, REDIS_URL

## Process
### Functions
- `parse_args()`: (no docstring)
- `utc_now()`: (no docstring)
- `load_json(raw)`: (no docstring)
- `redis_client(redis_url)`: (no docstring)
- `queue_snapshot(client)`: (no docstring)
- `heartbeat_rows(client)`: (no docstring)
- `recent_results(client, sample)`: (no docstring)
- `result_is_failure(item)`: (no docstring)
- `schedule_rows(client)`: (no docstring)
- `process_catalog_summary()`: (no docstring)
- `trace_log_summary(limit)`: (no docstring)
- `derive_operations(report)`: (no docstring)
- `advanced_feature_gap_report(report)`: Summarize missing advanced agent features and safe delegation advice.
- `build_report(client, sample)`: (no docstring)
- `print_status(report, sample)`: (no docstring)

- Writes files (detected 1 patterns)
